title: Yellow Polyester Easter Chick Decorations, 4cm (1 Piece) - Durable & Adorable Design, Ideal for Arts & Crafts

PREMIUM QUALITY MATERIALS: Each cute chick is crafted from durable polyester and plastic, ensuring that your delightful decorations last through many Easter seasons.
SPREAD THE CUTENESS: Share the love and spread the cuteness with our yellow Easter chick decorations. Use them to decorate your home, office, or classroom and bring a smile to all those around you.

VERSATILE DECORATION: Whether used for basket stuffers, table scatter, or as part of a DIY Easter display, these Easter chicks will bring a smile to everyone's face. So, let your creativity flow and add some adorable Easter charm to any space.
GIFTING PERFECTION: These cute chicks make for a perfect gift for children, friends, family members or anyone who loves Easter. Spread the joy of the holiday with these delightful decorations.
